form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Comes off a 42 day let-up. First-up led but faded 2nd of 7 at this track Bm60 on February 14 over 1200m, slow going 1.5 len behind Heroic Chief with 58.5kg at $6.50. Last start 4th of 8 at this track Bm60 on February 28 over 1200m, 0.9 len behind Worthy Enuff with 58.5kg at $8.50. Profiles nicely. Fitter and can find a place.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Last start from last on the turn 7th of 10 at Ipswich Cl2 on March 26 over 1100m, 3 len behind Capital Heart carrying 54kg at $151. Prefer to see her back in form.
